login.tagline: Your schedule and theirs, on one screen.
login.missingFields: Please check your email or password.
login.resendToast: We've resent the confirmation email. Please check your inbox.

signup.title: Create account
signup.inviteBody: Sign up to line up each other's work schedules on one screen.

errors.nameTooLong: Name must be 30 characters or fewer.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.termsRequired: Please agree to all required terms.

signup.airlineHintDefault: You can pick an airline that's coming soon, too.
signup.airlineHintActive: Upload a photo of your {airline} schedule and we'll read it in automatically.
signup.airlineHintPending: {airline} is coming in July. Until then, enter your shifts manually, and photo auto-recognition turns on the moment it's ready.
signup.inviteConnectNote: Whatever role you pick, you'll be connected with {who} automatically.
signup.nameHint: This is the name friends see.
signup.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including letters and numbers.
signup.agreeTos: I agree to the Terms of Service.
signup.agreePrivacy: I agree to the collection and use of personal information.
signup.agreeMarketing: I agree to receive update and event notifications.
signup.visibilityDesc: This is separate from schedule sharing. Your schedule is only shared when a colleague requests it and you accept.
signup.visibilityChangeNote: You can change this anytime in Settings → Visibility.
signup.privacyStartsNote: Your schedule starts private when you sign up. You can change visibility anytime in Settings.
signup.confirmBodyLine1: We've sent a confirmation email to {email}.
signup.confirmBodyLine2: Tap the link in the email to
signup.bottomCardBody: Add your schedule and share it with colleagues.

welcome.subtitle: Before we start, tell us what you do.
welcome.airlineHintDefault: You can pick an airline that's coming soon, too.
welcome.airlineHintActive: Upload a photo of your {airline} schedule and we'll read it in automatically.
welcome.airlineHintPending: {airline} is coming in July. Until then, enter your shifts manually, and photo auto-recognition turns on the moment it's ready.
welcome.switchAccount: Sign in with a different account

find.title: Forgot password
find.inputDesc: Enter the email you signed up with and we'll send you a password reset link.
find.sentBodyLine1: We've sent a password reset link to the address above.
find.sentBodyLine2: Tap the link in the email to set a new password.
find.sentSpamNote: If you don't see it, check your spam folder too.
find.resendRetry: Please try again in a moment.

reset.invalidTitle: This link is invalid or expired
reset.invalidBodyLine1: Your password reset link has expired or was already used.
reset.readyDescLine1: Enter the password you'd like to use.
reset.readyDescLine2: At least 8 characters, including letters and numbers.
reset.errorComposition: Password must be at least 8 characters, including letters and numbers.
reset.successToast: Your password has been changed. Please log in with your new password.

install.heroBody: RaiLink works like a regular app once you add it to your home screen — no separate install needed. Just set it up once.
install.iosStep2: Tap the Share button <chip></chip> at the bottom center.
install.iosStep3: Choose “Add to Home Screen” from the menu — that's it.
install.iosWarning: Be sure to open it in Safari, not Chrome. On iPhone, only Safari can add to the home screen.
install.androidStep2: Tap the <chip>Install app</chip> prompt that appears at the bottom or in the address bar.
install.androidStep3: If you don't see it, open the menu at the top right and choose “Install app” (or “Add to Home Screen”).
install.value1Head: Launch in one tap from your home screen
install.value1Sub: No address bar to go through.
install.value2Sub: The top and bottom bars in iOS Safari disappear.

public.title: Public
public.desc: Your name and photo appear in colleague search. Schedules still require separate acceptance.

private.title: Private
private.desc: You won't appear in search. Only colleagues who know your exact employee ID can request sharing.

ktx.title: KTX crew
ktx.desc: I'm a KORAIL KTX cabin attendant.

airline.title: Airline crew
airline.desc: I'm airline cabin or flight crew.

other.title: Other
other.desc: You can use this even if you're not crew.
